title: Use Custom Variables in GoHighLevel Voice AI Prompts
description: Learn how to use custom variables in GoHighLevel Voice AI for personalized calls. Step-by-step guide for Indian agencies with WhatsApp integration and ROI ca...
html_content:
🚀 Try GoHighLevel FREE for 30 days — No credit card required. Start your free trial here →

Stop Making Generic Voice Calls: Use Custom Variables in GoHighLevel Voice AI

You're running a digital marketing agency in Mumbai, Bangalore, or Delhi. You've got 15 clients, each with different needs, pain points, and customer profiles. Your team is lean—maybe three people handling everything from strategy to execution. And right now, your Voice AI is doing what every other agency's Voice AI is doing: leaving the same robotic, one-size-fits-all message on prospect voicemails.

Your competitors are doing the same thing. Your prospects are ignoring everyone equally.

But what if your Voice AI could remember that Rajesh Kumar from that Delhi fintech startup mentioned cash flow problems three weeks ago? What if it could reference his previous conversation, use his actual name with correct pronunciation, and ask about solutions you specifically discussed? That's not just better automation—that's genuine relationship-building at scale.

This is where custom variables in GoHighLevel's Voice AI become your unfair advantage.

The Problem with Generic Voice Automation

Most Indian agencies use WhatsApp and basic automation tools to reach prospects. But voice calls? They're stuck with templates. Same greeting. Same pitch. Same disconnect rate.

Meanwhile, your best salespeople—the ones who actually close deals—they personalize everything. They remember details. They reference previous conversations. They make prospects feel seen.

The gap between your best salesperson and your Voice AI? That's costing you deals. And it's costing you team bandwidth too. Your sales manager ends up manually calling prospects because the automation feels too impersonal. Your ROI suffers. Your team burns out.

In competitive markets like Bangalore's SaaS scene or Hyderabad's IT services corridor, this generic approach gets you ignored—especially when your competitors are already using AI smarter than you are.

What Are Custom Variables and Why They Matter for Your Business

Custom variables are data fields you create to make your Voice AI smarter and more contextual.

Instead of a generic call that says "Hi, this is Amit from Digital Marketing Solutions," your Voice AI can say: "Hi Rajesh, thanks for downloading the guide on reducing customer acquisition costs last Tuesday. I noticed you're in the fintech space—I wanted to share something specific we've done for similar companies in Delhi that improved their CAC by 34%."

That difference? It's the difference between a voice call that gets hung up and one that starts a conversation.

Custom variables pull directly from your GoHighLevel CRM. Your prospect's name, company, previous interactions, pain points, location—all of it gets injected into the Voice AI prompt automatically. No manual dialing. No scripting per prospect. Just intelligent, personalized automation.

Custom Variables vs. Built-In Variables: What's Different?

GoHighLevel has built-in variables like {{first_name}}, {{company_name}}, {{phone_number}}. These are pre-built and work out of the box.

Custom variables are fields you create based on your specific business. Examples for an Indian agency:

  • {{previous_pain_point}} — What challenge did they mention in your last call?
  • {{industry_vertical}} — Are they in SaaS, fintech, real estate, e-commerce?
  • {{last_interaction_date}} — When did you last connect with them?
  • {{competitor_name}} — Who are they currently using?
  • {{budget_range}} — Did they mention their ad spend capacity?

When you combine these with Voice AI, your calls stop sounding like robo-calls and start sounding like a thoughtful colleague reaching out.

How to Add Custom Variables to Your Voice AI Prompts in GoHighLevel

Step 1: Create Your Custom Fields in the Contact Record

In GoHighLevel, go to Contacts → Select a Contact → Custom Fields. Create the variables you need. For example:

  • Industry (text field)
  • Last_Interaction_Notes (text area)
  • Pain_Point_Discussed (dropdown)
  • Ideal_Solution (text field)

Fill these fields manually during your initial discovery calls or through forms/WhatsApp conversations. This is one-time setup work that pays dividends across unlimited calls.

Step 2: Build Your Voice AI Agent with Custom Variables in the Prompt

Go to Voice → Create New Voice Agent. In the system prompt, write something like:

"You are calling {{first_name}} from {{company_name}}. They work in {{industry}} and mentioned a key challenge: {{pain_point}}. Reference this in your opening. Ask about their experience with {{competitor_name}} if they're using it. Your goal: schedule a call to discuss how we've helped similar {{industry}} companies solve {{pain_point}}."

GoHighLevel will automatically replace these variables with actual contact data when the call is placed.

Step 3: Map Variables to Your Contact Fields

When you save your Voice AI agent, GoHighLevel will ask which contact field maps to which variable. Select the correct field for each {{variable}}. This ensures the right data flows into the right part of your script.

Step 4: Test with a Real Contact

Before launching to your entire prospect list, test with a contact that has all custom fields filled. Make a test call. Listen to how the Voice AI performs. Does it sound natural? Does it correctly reference the previous interaction? Adjust your prompt language if needed.

Step 5: Set Up Your Automation Campaign

Create a workflow that triggers Voice AI calls based on your criteria. For example:

  • Call all leads tagged "High-Intent" who haven't been contacted in 14 days
  • Call prospects from a specific industry vertical on Tuesday afternoons (best contact time)
  • Call contacts whose pain_point field matches "lead generation" this week

Let GoHighLevel handle the dialing, timing, and personalization automatically.

Real-World Example: A Delhi-Based B2B SaaS Agency

Imagine you run a Google Ads and SEO agency in Delhi. Your typical client is a SaaS company with ₹20-50 lakh annual ad spend.

Without custom variables: Generic Voice AI calls 80 prospects. Gets 4 callbacks. Schedules 2 consultations. Converts 0 because the call felt impersonal.

With custom variables: Your Voice AI references specific metrics about each company ("I saw your website traffic dropped 12% last quarter"), mentions their industry peers you've worked with ("We've helped three similar SaaS startups in the HR-tech space reduce their cost-per-lead by 28%"), and opens with genuine insight ("Your last Google Ads campaign looked solid through September, but I noticed your CTR dipped in October—want to know why?").

Same 80 prospects. Now you get 12 callbacks. 8 consultations. 2 closed clients. That's a 400% improvement in conversions and your ROI on the Voice AI investment pays back in one month.

Agency Plan: $297/month (~₹24,700/month) — The most popular choice for Indian agencies. Unlimited contacts, advanced Voice AI, built-in SMS/WhatsApp, and white-label options.

GST Note: Add 18% GST to these prices for Indian payments. So the Agency plan costs approximately ₹29,146/month delivered.

ROI Math: If custom variables help you close just 2 additional clients per month, and your average client value is ₹1,50,000, you're making ₹3,00,000 in additional revenue monthly. Your GoHighLevel cost of ₹29,146 is 9.7% of that additional revenue. Most Indian agencies see payback in 2-3 weeks.

Compare this to Zoho CRM (which most Indian agencies use), which requires separate Voice AI add-ons and lacks the same customization depth. GoHighLevel bundles it all in one dashboard.

Integrating With WhatsApp: India's Communication Channel

Voice calls are powerful, but in India, WhatsApp is how deals get done.

After your Voice AI makes the call (and hopefully gets a callback), follow up via WhatsApp with a personalized message using the same custom variables:

"Hi {{first_name}}, great speaking with you about {{pain_point}}. I found a case study of a {{industry}} company similar to {{company_name}} that solved this in 6 weeks. Happy to share? Call or message back."

You can automate this entire sequence in GoHighLevel. After a Voice AI call completes, automatically send a WhatsApp message with customized context. This keeps the conversation warm and uses the channel your prospects actually check constantly.

Common Questions About Custom Variables in GoHighLevel Voice AI

Q: Can I use custom variables from my existing Zoho CRM contacts?

Not directly. You'll need to migrate your contacts to GoHighLevel (it's a one-time process) or manually populate custom fields in GoHighLevel. Most agencies find the migration takes 2-3 hours with GoHighLevel's import tools.

Q: What happens if a contact's custom field is blank?

GoHighLevel uses fallback language. You can set your prompt to say "if pain_point is blank, use this generic opening instead." Prevents awkward silences.

Q: Can I use custom variables in WhatsApp automations too?

Yes. Same variables work across Voice, WhatsApp, SMS, and email in GoHighLevel. One data set, multiple channels.

Q: How accurate is the Voice AI pronunciation of Indian names?

GoHighLevel's Voice AI has improved significantly. For regional names, you can manually set a "phonetic_spelling" custom field (e.g., "Rajesh" = "Rah-JESH") to ensure correct pronunciation. This matters for relationship-building.

Q: Is there a learning curve for non-technical team members?

Yes, but it's manageable. After one training session, your team can populate custom fields and create basic Voice AI prompts. The system is designed for agency owners, not just developers.

Start Your Custom Variables Journey Today

The agencies winning in 2026 aren't the ones with the most tools. They're the ones using fewer tools smarter. Custom variables in GoHighLevel Voice AI transform automation from a time-saver into a relationship-builder—and that's what actually closes deals.

Whether you're in Mumbai, Bangalore, Pune, Hyderabad, or Delhi, the playbook is the same: collect data, personalize at scale, follow up via WhatsApp, close more deals.

Ready to test this? Start your free 30-day GoHighLevel trial here—no credit card required. Build your first custom Voice AI agent this week. See the difference personalized automation makes to your close rate.

Your prospects deserve better than generic robo-calls. Your business deserves better than generic automation tools. Custom variables give you both.
